sys_remote_update_set.description: ServiceNow Case Management POC scoped application : proof-of-concept replatforming of a subset of ArkCase case/task/party/role/portal/dashboard capabilities. AAP Section 0.4.1 single Update Set deliverable.
sys_remote_update_set.name: x_casemgmt_case_management v1.0.0

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_scope"> <sys_scope action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <licensable>false</licensable> <logo /> <name>x_casemgmt</name> <private>false</private> <scope>x_casemgmt</scope> <short_description>Application scope for Case Management POC</short_description> <source>x_casemgmt</source> <sys_id>0e77960b9cdc260c199f0d2c23f37603</sys_id> <vendor>ServiceNow Case Management POC</vendor> <vendor_prefix>x_casemgmt</vendor_prefix> <version>1.0.0</version> </sys_scope> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Case Management
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_app"> <sys_app action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <description>Proof-of-concept ServiceNow scoped application that re-platforms a defined subset of ArkCase 2021.03 case-management capabilities onto the ServiceNow Now Platform. Implements seven enumerated POC capabilities: (1) the case lifecycle as the x_casemgmt_case table replicating ArkCase CaseFile fields; (2) the task domain as x_casemgmt_case_task replicating ArkCase AcmTask fields; (3) polymorphic party association as a single x_casemgmt_case_party table that collapses ArkCase PersonAssociation and PersonOrganizationAssociation; (4) three scoped roles (case_manager, case_agent, case_viewer) with table-level and field-level ACLs replacing ArkCase ApplicationRolesToPrivilegesConfig; (5) two Flow Designer flows (one per case type: General Inquiry, Complaint) replacing the Activiti BPMN state machine; (6) an Experience Portal with two unauthenticated pages (case submission and case status lookup); and (7) two Performance Analytics dashboards (Agent Workspace and Manager View). All artifacts live in the auto-assigned x_casemgmt namespace; zero global-scope writes are made. No external integrations, no email notifications, no document management, and no data migration from ArkCase are performed.</description> <enforce_license>false</enforce_license> <licensable>false</licensable> <logo /> <name>x_casemgmt Case Management</name> <private>false</private> <scope>x_casemgmt</scope> <short_description>Proof-of-concept ServiceNow re-platforming of ArkCase case-management capabilities.</short_description> <sys_id>82b99028936f74320d74d6f88357a5af</sys_id> <trackable>true</trackable> <vendor>ServiceNow Case Management POC</vendor> <vendor_prefix>x_casemgmt</vendor_prefix> <version>1.0.0</version> </sys_app> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case.number
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Number</column_label> <comments>Auto-generated case number with format CASE0000001 (4-char prefix CASE + 7-digit zero-padded sequence). Read-only. Auto-population is configured by the parent table's number_ref pointing at ../numbers/sys_number_x_casemgmt_case.xml. Primary user-facing identifier of the case (referenced by portal submission and lookup, seed scripts, dashboards). Replaces ArkCase CaseFile.caseNumber (@AcmSequence + @TableGenerator).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort>true</defaultsort> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>number</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>string</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>40</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>true</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference/> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>0bf56c205b5fbda5c5971de48d3ca279</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_number</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>true</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case.type
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>3</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Type</column_label> <comments>Optional Choice categorizing the case per AAP Section 0.5.7 verbatim (no Mandatory marker). Values: General Inquiry, Complaint (extensible). Drives which Flow Designer flow handles state transitions: ../flows/general_inquiry_state_machine.xml or ../flows/complaint_state_machine.xml. Used by ../reports/x_casemgmt_all_cases_by_type.xml. Replaces ArkCase CaseFile.caseType (free-form String). Internal forms, the Table API, the scripted REST submission endpoint, and seed cases all populate this field explicitly with one of the supported labels.</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>type</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>string</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>40</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference/> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>9a49190f6a6b8f2b4100073c53631168</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_type</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case.status
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>true</audit> <calculation/> <choice>3</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Status</column_label> <comments>Mandatory Choice tracking case lifecycle. Values: Draft, Open, In Progress, Pending, Resolved, Closed. Default: Draft. Drives entire case state-machine via Flow Designer flows in ../flows/. Audited (audit=true) for forensic tracking. Replaces ArkCase CaseFile.status (String, defaulted to DRAFT via @PrePersist).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value>Draft</default_value> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>status</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>string</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length>40</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference/> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>5f0be2eaed29d45b1d63d64e876d22c4</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_status</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case.priority
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>3</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Priority</column_label> <comments>Optional Choice categorizing case urgency per AAP Section 0.5.7 verbatim (no Mandatory marker). Values: Low, Medium, High, Critical. Default: Medium - so every case row receives a non-empty value at insert time without a mandatory constraint. Used by ../reports/x_casemgmt_all_cases_by_priority.xml (Manager View dashboard bar chart). Replaces ArkCase CaseFile.priority (free-form String).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value>Medium</default_value> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>priority</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>string</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>40</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference/> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>7584a06a06745f24e42efb27f0ae5975</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_priority</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case.opened_date
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Opened Date</column_label> <comments>DateTime auto-set on case creation via ../business_rules/x_casemgmt_set_opened_date.xml. Read-only from user perspective. One of THREE fields exposed by ../portal/rest/sys_ws_definition_x_casemgmt_case_status_lookup.xml (status, subject, opened_date). Also used by ../reports/x_casemgmt_avg_time_to_close.xml and ../reports/x_casemgmt_cases_opened_30d.xml. sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case.duration_to_close

Used by ../reports/x_casemgmt_avg_time_to_close.xml as the aggregation_source for the Manager View dashboard's "Average Time to Close" single-score widget (AAP Section 0.4.4 Widget 4). Resolves QA Checkpoint 4 Issue #1: implements Option A (function field) so the widget renders an actual Duration AVG instead of the "No data" placeholder. Not stored on the row (virtual=true); not displayed on form/list (display=false); not auditable (audit=false). Read-only by definition for function fields.</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>false</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>duration_to_close</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition>glidefunction:datediff(closed_date,opened_date)</function_definition> <function_field>true</function_field> <internal_type>glide_duration</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>40</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>true</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference/> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>f08a56ae8a5263f0af629913c48ae173</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_duration_to_close</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>true</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_task.case
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Case</column_label> <comments>Mandatory reference to the parent case (x_casemgmt_case). Queried by the case state-machine flow's "all tasks closed" guard for the In Progress -> Resolved transition (../flows/sub_flows/validate_resolved_transition.xml, ../script_includes/x_casemgmt_CaseTransitionValidator.xml) via addQuery('case', current.sys_id).addQuery('status', '!=', 'Closed') - if any rows are returned the flow throws the literal blocking error "All tasks must be closed before resolving this case." (AAP Section 0.7.4 verbatim). Replaces ArkCase AcmTask.attachedToObjectId/attachedToObjectType polymorphic parent linkage; in this POC the parent is always a x_casemgmt_case row, so the polymorphism is collapsed into a single fixed-target reference. Used by case_agent "Assigned only" ACL conditions on x_casemgmt_case_task via dot-walk current.case.assigned_agent / current.case.assigned_group. Cascade rule is "none" - deleting a parent case does NOT auto-cascade-delete its child tasks (POC-safe default; manual cleanup required).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>case</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>reference</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length>32</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case_task</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference>x_casemgmt_case</reference> <reference_cascade_rule>none</reference_cascade_rule> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>25cae07ed16e95fd89a4c8013152ecc2</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_task_case</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_task.subject

Primary human-readable identifier in the case_task list view, the parent case's task related list, and the My Overdue Tasks report. Values: Investigation, Review, Follow-up, Other. Authored as separate sys_choice rows in ../choices/sys_choice_case_task_type.xml. Surfaces in the case_task list view, the parent case's task related list, and the auto-generated form. Replaces ArkCase AcmTask.type (free-form String, no validator). sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_task.status
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>3</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Status</column_label> <comments>Optional Choice tracking task lifecycle per AAP Section 0.5.7 verbatim (no Mandatory marker). Values: Open, In Progress, Closed. Default: Open - so every newly inserted task lands in the correct starting state automatically without requiring a mandatory constraint. Authored as separate sys_choice rows in ../choices/sys_choice_case_task_status.xml. Used by the case state-machine flow's "all tasks closed" guard for the In Progress -> Resolved transition (AAP Section 0.5.5); failure surfaces the verbatim blocking error "All tasks must be closed before resolving this case." (AAP Section 0.7.4). Replaces ArkCase AcmTask.status (free-form String, no validator).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value>Open</default_value> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>status</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>string</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>40</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case_task</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference/> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>af19c46ec8457885c75512edec980172</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_task_status</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_task.assigned_to
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Assigned To</column_label> <comments>Mandatory reference to sys_user - the user responsible for this task. Filter for the My Overdue Tasks report (../reports/x_casemgmt_my_overdue_tasks.xml) on the Agent Workspace dashboard, which queries assigned_to = javascript:gs.getUserID() AND due_date < javascript:gs.daysAgoStart(0) AND status != Closed. Used by case_agent "Assigned only" ACL conditions on x_casemgmt_case_task as one half of the access check (current.assigned_to == gs.getUserID()), with the other half dot-walking current.case.assigned_agent / current.case.assigned_group. Replaces ArkCase AcmTask.assignee (String username, resolved at runtime via OpenLDAP id; the target uses a proper foreign key to sys_user). Cascade rule is empty (default "no cascade" - deleting a sys_user does NOT auto-cascade-delete tasks; manual cleanup or reassignment of orphaned tasks is acceptable).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>assigned_to</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>reference</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length>32</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case_task</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference>sys_user</reference> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>388df21ea3ca149d70916144f84ecf42</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_task_assigned_to</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

Replaces ArkCase AcmTask.dueDate (@NotNull Date).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>due_date</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>glide_date</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length>40</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case_task</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference/> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>a20971037c6fb4c520d7a13231b15f3b</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_task_due_date</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_party.case
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Case</column_label> <comments>Mandatory reference to the parent case (x_casemgmt_case). The single most important field on the x_casemgmt_case_party table - it ties every party row (Person or Organization) back to its parent case. Replaces ArkCase PersonAssociation.parentId/parentType/parentTitle polymorphic parent linkage (and the equivalent on PersonOrganizationAssociation); in this POC the parent is always a x_casemgmt_case row, so the polymorphism is collapsed into a single fixed-target reference. Powers the case-form Related List rendering (AAP Section 0.4.4) so that case parties show under the case form. Used by case_agent "Assigned only" ACL conditions on x_casemgmt_case_party via dot-walk current.case.assigned_agent / current.case.assigned_group (AAP Section 0.5.6). Cascade rule is "none" - deleting a parent case does NOT auto-cascade-delete its child parties (POC-safe default; manual cleanup required). Seed data resolves the parent-case sys_id by lookup of x_casemgmt_case.number via ../scripts/seed_demo_data.js (no hardcoded sys_ids, per AAP Section 0.7.2).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>case</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>reference</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length>32</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case_party</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference>x_casemgmt_case</reference> <reference_cascade_rule>none</reference_cascade_rule> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>fbd5378ac5055b3db843042ff20777b5</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_party_case</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_party.party_type
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>3</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Party Type</column_label> <comments>Mandatory Choice discriminator field for polymorphic case_party rows. Values: Person, Organization. Authored as separate sys_choice rows in ../choices/sys_choice_case_party_party_type.xml. Drives conditional visibility and requiredness of the sibling person (Reference -> sys_user) and organization (Reference -> core_company) fields via the UI Policy at ../ui_policy/x_casemgmt_case_party_conditional_fields.xml. Replaces ArkCase's cm_class_name JPA discriminator on acm_person_assoc / acm_person_org_assoc with a human-readable Choice; collapses the two ArkCase association tables (PersonAssociation, PersonOrganizationAssociation) into a single ServiceNow polymorphic table per AAP Section 0.4.3. No default value - user MUST explicitly choose Person or Organization, ensuring the polymorphic intent is always explicit.</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>party_type</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>string</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length>40</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case_party</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference/> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>5e02afdbd2f05f407e986015e93d1238</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_party_party_type</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_party.person
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Person</column_label> <comments>Reference to sys_user. Conditional: required when party_type=Person (enforced by UI Policy in ../ui_policy/x_casemgmt_case_party_conditional_fields.xml). Replaces ArkCase PersonAssociation.person and PersonOrganizationAssociation.person @ManyToOne (which targeted ArkCase's Person entity; here we leverage OOB sys_user instead). Person half of the polymorphism collapse pattern (AAP Section 0.4.3): when party_type=Person this field is required and visible while the sibling organization field is hidden; when party_type=Organization this field is hidden while organization is required. Dictionary-level mandatory=false to allow Organization-typed rows to save with this field empty - the conditional mandatoriness is enforced by the UI Policy. Cascade rule is empty (default "no cascade" - deleting a sys_user does NOT auto-cascade-delete party rows; manual cleanup of orphaned references is acceptable). Seed data resolves the user sys_id by lookup of sys_user.user_name via ../scripts/seed_demo_data.js (no hardcoded sys_ids, per AAP Section 0.7.2).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>person</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>reference</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>32</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case_party</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference>sys_user</reference> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>d9b322d03c2bb79ef07a261e2f686cb4</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_party_person</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_party.organization
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Organization</column_label> <comments>Reference to core_company. Conditional: required when party_type=Organization (enforced by UI Policy in ../ui_policy/x_casemgmt_case_party_conditional_fields.xml). Replaces ArkCase PersonOrganizationAssociation.organization @ManyToOne (which targeted ArkCase's Organization entity; here we leverage OOB core_company instead). Organization half of the polymorphism collapse pattern (AAP Section 0.4.3): when party_type=Organization this field is required and visible while the sibling person field is hidden; when party_type=Person this field is hidden while person is required. Dictionary-level mandatory=false to allow Person-typed rows to save with this field empty - the conditional mandatoriness is enforced by the UI Policy. Cascade rule is empty (default "no cascade" - deleting a core_company does NOT auto-cascade-delete party rows; manual cleanup of orphaned references is acceptable). Seed data resolves the company sys_id by lookup of core_company.name via ../scripts/seed_demo_data.js (no hardcoded sys_ids, per AAP Section 0.7.2).</comments> <create_roles/> <default_value/> <defaultsort/> <delete_roles/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>true</display> <dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_default_value/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>organization</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <foreign_database/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>reference</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>32</max_length> <name>x_casemgmt_case_party</name> <next_element/> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_roles/> <reference>core_company</reference> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floor/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <reference_qual_condition/> <reference_type/> <sizeclass/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <staged>false</staged> <sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1fa3f30c65afbf042f32440bf955199f</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_casemgmt_case_party_organization</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual>false</virtual> <virtual_type/> <widget/> <write_roles/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_read_agent_assigned
sys_update_xml.payload:
<record_update table="sys_security_acl">
    <sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
        <active>true</active>
        <admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides>
        <advanced>true</advanced>
        <condition/>
        <description>Table-level ACL: x_casemgmt_case_agent can read x_casemgmt_case records ONLY when assigned_agent = current user OR assigned_group contains current user (per AAP Section 0.5.6 'Assigned only'). Affects list views, form load, related lists, report rows, and dashboard aggregates - any unauthorized case row is filtered out of every read surface.</description>
        <name>x_casemgmt_case</name>
        <operation>read</operation>
        <roles>x_casemgmt_case_agent</roles>
        <script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var currentUserId = gs.getUserID();
    if (current.assigned_agent == currentUserId) {
        return true;
    }
    if (current.assigned_group && !current.assigned_group.nil()) {
        var groupId = current.assigned_group.toString();
        if (groupId && gs.getUser().isMemberOf(groupId)) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
})();]]></script>
        <sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name>
        <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
        <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on>
        <sys_id>ed26b2ef9256d55de66e4c1ac7b1997e</sys_id>
        <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
        <sys_name>x_casemgmt_case</sys_name>
        <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package>
        <sys_policy/>
        <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope>
        <sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_x_casemgmt_case_read_agent_assigned</sys_update_name>
        <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
        <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on>
        <type>record</type>
    </sys_security_acl>
</record_update>

<record_update table="sys_security_acl">
    <sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
        <active>true</active>
        <admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides>
        <advanced>true</advanced>

        <description>Table-level ACL: x_casemgmt_case_agent can write x_casemgmt_case records ONLY when assigned_agent = current user OR assigned_group contains current user (per AAP Section 0.5.6 'Assigned only'). Field-level ACLs on assigned_group/assigned_agent further restrict those specific fields.</description>
        <name>x_casemgmt_case</name>
        <operation>write</operation>
        <roles>x_casemgmt_case_agent</roles>
        <script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var currentUserId = gs.getUserID();
    if (current.assigned_agent == currentUserId) {
        return true;
    }
    if (current.assigned_group && !current.assigned_group.nil()) {
        var groupId = current.assigned_group.toString();
        if (groupId && gs.getUser().isMemberOf(groupId)) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
})();]]></script>
        <sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name>
        <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>

sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_security_acl"> <sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides> <advanced>false</advanced> <condition/> <description>Field-level ACL: only x_casemgmt_case_manager can write the assigned_group field on x_casemgmt_case. case_agent and case_viewer are denied (privilege escalation prevention).</description> <name>x_casemgmt_case.assigned_group</name> <operation>write</operation> <roles>x_casemgmt_case_manager</roles> <script/> <sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>04d4a9cdb62499be0a894d217c979202</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>x_casemgmt_case.assigned_group</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_x_casemgmt_case_assigned_group_field_acl</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <type>record</type> </sys_security_acl> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_assigned_agent_field_acl
sys_update_xml.payload:
<record_update table="sys_security_acl">
    <sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
        <active>true</active>
        <admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides>
        <advanced>true</advanced>
        <condition/>
        <description>Field-level ACL: x_casemgmt_case_manager can always write assigned_agent; x_casemgmt_case_agent can write assigned_agent only if they are the currently-assigned agent on the case. Allows agent self-reassignment without permitting case-grabbing.</description>
        <name>x_casemgmt_case.assigned_agent</name>
        <operation>write</operation>
        <roles>x_casemgmt_case_manager,x_casemgmt_case_agent</roles>
        <script><![CDATA[(function() {
    // Per AAP Section 0.5.1: "Field-level ACL: write restricted to
    // manager and agent-assigned". Per AAP Section 0.5.6 Matrix and
    // Section 0.7.3 Gate 3 ("case_agent cannot access unassigned
    // cases"), this script must DENY by default and grant only to
    // (a) any case_manager, and (b) the currently-assigned case_agent.

    // Branch 1: case_manager - unconditional grant.
    // The manager is the case-management tier's delegation authority;
    // they may freely assign, reassign, or null-out the assigned_agent
    // column on any case in the scoped application.
    if (gs.getUser().hasRole('x_casemgmt_case_manager')) {
        return true;
    }

    // Branch 2: currently-assigned case_agent - conditional grant.
    // The agent may modify assigned_agent (handoff, decline, reassign
    // to peer) ONLY when they are the currently-assigned agent on the
    // case at write time. The strict equality check against
    // gs.getUserID() prevents:
    //   - non-assigned agents from self-grabbing unassigned cases
    //     (current.assigned_agent is null - comparison yields false)
    //   - non-assigned agents from poaching other agents' cases
    //     (current.assigned_agent is a peer's sys_id - comparison
    //      yields false)
    //   - non-agent role holders from being granted via this branch
    //     (the hasRole() guard filters them out before the comparison)
    // The comparison `current.assigned_agent == gs.getUserID()` works
    // in ServiceNow because GlideRecord reference fields auto-resolve
    // to their sys_id when compared as strings; this is the standard
    // pattern used throughout the platform's ACL conditions.
    if (gs.getUser().hasRole('x_casemgmt_case_agent')) {
        if (current.assigned_agent == gs.getUserID()) {
            return true;
        }
    }

    // Default: deny. Viewers, anonymous users, and any other role
    // populations fall through to this branch. Per AAP Section 0.5.6
    // case_viewer has Write=No on every column of x_casemgmt_case;
    // this default-deny implements that mandate at the field level.
    return false;
})();]]></script>
        <sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name>
        <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
        <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on>

sys_update_xml.name: x_casemgmt_case_task_read_agent_assigned
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_security_acl"> <sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides> <advanced>true</advanced> <condition/> <description>Allows users with the x_casemgmt_case_agent role to read case_task records ONLY where the parent case has assigned_agent=current user OR assigned_group contains current user.</description> <name>x_casemgmt_case_task</name> <operation>read</operation> <roles>x_casemgmt_case_agent</roles> <script><![CDATA[(function() { if (!current.case || current.case.nil()) { return false; } var parentCase = current.case.getRefRecord(); if (!parentCase || !parentCase.isValidRecord()) { return false; } var currentUserId = gs.getUserID(); if (parentCase.assigned_agent == currentUserId) { return true; } var groupId = parentCase.assigned_group.toString(); if (groupId && gs.getUser().isMemberOf(groupId)) { return true; } return false; })();]]></script> <sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1ea69bf11f64a85ddf0c7e970779fefe</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>x_casemgmt_case_task</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_x_casemgmt_case_task_read_agent_assigned</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <type>record</type> </sys_security_acl> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: CaseTransitionValidator
sys_update_xml.payload:
<record_update table="sys_script_include">
    <sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
        <access>package_private</access>
        <active>true</active>
        <api_name>x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator</api_name>
        <caller_access/>
        <client_callable>false</client_callable>
        <description>Reusable transition guards for case lifecycle operations. Exposes canTransitionToOpen, canTransitionToInProgress, canTransitionToResolved, canTransitionToClosed. Replaces ArkCase's ChangeCaseFileStateService. Verbatim error: All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.</description>
        <name>CaseTransitionValidator</name>
        <script><![CDATA[var CaseTransitionValidator = Class.create();
CaseTransitionValidator.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},

    /**
     * Returns true if the Open transition is permitted: assigned_group must
     * be populated. Returns false otherwise; caller surfaces a blocking
     * form-level error.
     */
    canTransitionToOpen: function(caseRec) {
        if (!caseRec || !caseRec.assigned_group || caseRec.assigned_group.nil()) {
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    },

    /**
     * Returns true if the In Progress transition is permitted: assigned_agent
     * must be populated AND must be a member of assigned_group.
     */
    canTransitionToInProgress: function(caseRec) {
        if (!caseRec || !caseRec.assigned_agent || caseRec.assigned_agent.nil()) {
            return false;
        }
        if (!caseRec.assigned_group || caseRec.assigned_group.nil()) {
            return false;
        }
        var groupId = caseRec.assigned_group.toString();
        var userId = caseRec.assigned_agent.toString();
        var grm = new GlideRecord('sys_user_grmember');
        grm.addQuery('user', userId);
        grm.addQuery('group', groupId);
        grm.query();
        return grm.hasNext();
    },

    /**
     * Returns true if the Resolved transition is permitted: NO child task
     * may have status != 'Closed'. Throws the verbatim error message
     * required by AAP Section 0.7.4.
     */
    canTransitionToResolved: function(caseRec) {
        if (!caseRec || !caseRec.sys_id) {
            return false;
        }
        var taskGr = new GlideRecord('x_casemgmt_case_task');
        taskGr.addQuery('case', caseRec.sys_id.toString());
        taskGr.addQuery('status', '!=', 'Closed');
        taskGr.setLimit(1);
        taskGr.query();
        if (taskGr.hasNext()) {
            this._error = 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.';
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    },

    /**
     * Returns true if the Closed transition is permitted: caller must hold
     * the x_casemgmt_case_manager role.
     */
    canTransitionToClosed: function(caseRec) {
        return gs.getUser().hasRole('x_casemgmt_case_manager');
    },

    getError: function() {
        return this._error || '';
    },

    type: 'CaseTransitionValidator'
};
]]></script>
        <sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name>
        <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
        <sys_created_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_created_on>
        <sys_id>63a5b319207ac89ab54176fe58747d02</sys_id>
        <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
        <sys_name>CaseTransitionValidator</sys_name>
        <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package>
        <sys_policy/>
        <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope>
        <sys_update_name>sys_script_include_x_casemgmt_CaseTransitionValidator</sys_update_name>
        <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
        <sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_updated_on>
    </sys_script_include>
</record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: CasePortalService
sys_update_xml.payload:
<record_update table="sys_script_include">
    <sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
        <access>package_private</access>
        <active>true</active>
        <api_name>x_casemgmt.CasePortalService</api_name>
        <caller_access/>
        <client_callable>false</client_callable>
        <description>Service helpers for the unauthenticated portal scripted REST endpoints (case_submit, case_status_lookup). Whitelists the input fields on submission and the output fields on lookup. Verbatim not-found message: No case found with that number.</description>
        <name>CasePortalService</name>
        <script><![CDATA[var CasePortalService = Class.create();
CasePortalService.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},

    /**
     * Insert a Draft x_casemgmt_case from anonymous portal submission.
     * Whitelisted input fields per AAP Section 0.7.4: subject, type,
     * description, requester_name, requester_email. Returns the
     * platform-generated case number on success; throws on validation error.
     */
    submitCase: function(payload) {
        if (!payload) { throw new Error('Empty submission'); }
        var gr = new GlideRecord('x_casemgmt_case');
        gr.initialize();
        gr.subject = (payload.subject || '').toString().trim();
        gr.type = (payload.type || 'General Inquiry').toString();
        gr.description = (payload.description || '').toString().trim();
        gr.requester_name = (payload.requester_name || '').toString().trim();
        gr.requester_email = (payload.requester_email || '').toString().trim();
        gr.status = 'Draft';
        if (!gr.subject || !gr.description || !gr.requester_name) {
            throw new Error('Missing required field(s).');
        }
        var sid = gr.insert();
        if (!sid) { throw new Error('Submission failed.'); }
        return { number: gr.number.toString() };
    },

    /**
     * Look up case by number; return ONLY the three whitelisted fields
     * (status, subject, opened_date) per AAP Section 0.7.4. Returns the
     * VERBATIM string "No case found with that number." on no-match.
     */
    lookupCase: function(caseNumber) {
        if (!caseNumber) { return { error: 'No case found with that number.' }; }
        var gr = new GlideRecord('x_casemgmt_case');
        gr.addQuery('number', caseNumber.toString().trim());
        gr.setLimit(1);
        gr.query();
        if (!gr.next()) {
            return { error: 'No case found with that number.' };
        }
        return {
            status:      gr.status.toString(),
            subject:     gr.subject.toString(),
            opened_date: gr.opened_date.toString()
        };
    },

    type: 'CasePortalService'
};
]]></script>
        <sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name>
        <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
        <sys_created_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_created_on>
        <sys_id>d1f050197637f6045adab99ea7600acc</sys_id>
        <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
        <sys_name>CasePortalService</sys_name>
        <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package>
        <sys_policy/>
        <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope>
        <sys_update_name>sys_script_include_x_casemgmt_CasePortalService</sys_update_name>
        <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
        <sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_updated_on>
    </sys_script_include>
</record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Block Draft Back-Transition
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_script"> <sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <abort_action>false</abort_action> <access>package_private</access> <action_delete>false</action_delete> <action_insert>false</action_insert> <action_query>false</action_query> <action_update>true</action_update> <active>true</active> <add_message>false</add_message> <advanced>true</advanced> <change_fields>false</change_fields> <client_callable>false</client_callable> <collection>x_casemgmt_case</collection> <condition/> <description>Before-update on x_casemgmt_case: aborts any backward transition to Draft.</description> <execute_function>false</execute_function> <filter_condition/> <is_rest>false</is_rest> <message/> <name>Block Draft Back-Transition</name> <order>100</order> <priority>100</priority> <rest_method/> <rest_method_text/> <rest_service/> <rest_service_text/> <rest_variables/> <role_conditions/> <script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) { // Block any backward transition to Draft. Per AAP Section 0.5.5 // verbatim: "Any state -> Draft is PROHIBITED. No backward // transitions to Draft." Error message verbatim from AAP // Section 0.7.4. if (previous && previous.status != 'Draft' && current.status == 'Draft') { gs.addErrorMessage('Cases cannot be returned to Draft.'); current.setAbortAction(true); } })(current, previous); ]]></script> <sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_domain>global</sys_domain> <sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path> <sys_id>a2a997458fe0c8b3b7853674c9cc4ef9</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Block Draft Back-Transition</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_script_x_casemgmt_block_draft_backtransition</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_updated_on> <template/> <when>before</when> </sys_script> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Block Terminal Closed
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_script"> <sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <abort_action>false</abort_action> <access>package_private</access> <action_delete>false</action_delete> <action_insert>false</action_insert> <action_query>false</action_query> <action_update>true</action_update> <active>true</active> <add_message>false</add_message> <advanced>true</advanced> <change_fields>false</change_fields> <client_callable>false</client_callable> <collection>x_casemgmt_case</collection> <condition/> <description>Before-update on x_casemgmt_case: aborts any modification when previous status was Closed.</description> <execute_function>false</execute_function> <filter_condition/> <is_rest>false</is_rest> <message/> <name>Block Terminal Closed</name> <order>110</order> <priority>100</priority> <rest_method/> <rest_method_text/> <rest_service/> <rest_service_text/> <rest_variables/> <role_conditions/> <script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) { // Block any modification of a case whose previous status was Closed. // Per AAP Section 0.5.5 verbatim: "Closed: Terminal state. No // transitions permitted from Closed." Error message verbatim from // AAP Section 0.7.4. if (previous && previous.status == 'Closed') { gs.addErrorMessage('Closed cases are terminal and cannot be modified.'); current.setAbortAction(true); } })(current, previous); ]]></script> <sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_domain>global</sys_domain> <sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path> <sys_id>f0bd667ec5c4d0dbbf0f3046a928308c</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Block Terminal Closed</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_script_x_casemgmt_block_terminal_closed</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_updated_on> <template/> <when>before</when> </sys_script> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Set Opened Date
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_script"> <sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <abort_action>false</abort_action> <access>package_private</access> <action_delete>false</action_delete> <action_insert>true</action_insert> <action_query>false</action_query> <action_update>false</action_update> <active>true</active> <add_message>false</add_message> <advanced>true</advanced> <change_fields>false</change_fields> <client_callable>false</client_callable> <collection>x_casemgmt_case</collection> <condition/> <description>Before-insert on x_casemgmt_case: auto-sets opened_date to gs.nowDateTime().</description> <execute_function>false</execute_function> <filter_condition/> <is_rest>false</is_rest> <message/> <name>Set Opened Date</name> <order>120</order> <priority>100</priority> <rest_method/> <rest_method_text/> <rest_service/> <rest_service_text/> <rest_variables/> <role_conditions/> <script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) { // Auto-set opened_date on insert. AAP Section 0.5.7: "opened_date : // DateTime : Auto-set on creation". if (current.opened_date.nil()) { current.opened_date = gs.nowDateTime(); } })(current, previous); ]]></script> <sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_domain>global</sys_domain> <sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path> <sys_id>b8b47024191fe9f3b9e19103b0cdabe9</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Set Opened Date</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_script_x_casemgmt_set_opened_date</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_updated_on> <template/> <when>before</when> </sys_script> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Set Closed Date
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_script"> <sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <abort_action>false</abort_action> <access>package_private</access> <action_delete>false</action_delete> <action_insert>false</action_insert> <action_query>false</action_query> <action_update>true</action_update> <active>true</active> <add_message>false</add_message> <advanced>true</advanced> <change_fields>false</change_fields> <client_callable>false</client_callable> <collection>x_casemgmt_case</collection> <condition/> <description>Before-update on x_casemgmt_case: auto-sets closed_date when status transitions to Closed.</description> <execute_function>false</execute_function> <filter_condition/> <is_rest>false</is_rest> <message/> <name>Set Closed Date</name> <order>130</order> <priority>100</priority> <rest_method/> <rest_method_text/> <rest_service/> <rest_service_text/> <rest_variables/> <role_conditions/> <script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) { // Auto-set closed_date when status transitions to Closed. AAP // Section 0.5.5: "Resolved -> Closed: Caller has // x_casemgmt_case_manager role; auto-set closed_date". if (previous && previous.status != 'Closed' && current.status == 'Closed') { current.closed_date = gs.nowDateTime(); } })(current, previous); ]]></script> <sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_domain>global</sys_domain> <sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path> <sys_id>217acf87f4d842bb4121a6ad1b0a4251</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Set Closed Date</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_script_x_casemgmt_set_closed_date</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_updated_on> <template/> <when>before</when> </sys_script> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Validate Assigned Agent Membership
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_script"> <sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <abort_action>false</abort_action> <access>package_private</access> <action_delete>false</action_delete> <action_insert>true</action_insert> <action_query>false</action_query> <action_update>true</action_update> <active>true</active> <add_message>false</add_message> <advanced>true</advanced> <change_fields>false</change_fields> <client_callable>false</client_callable> <collection>x_casemgmt_case</collection> <condition/> <description>Before-update on x_casemgmt_case: enforces assigned_agent must be a member of assigned_group.</description> <execute_function>false</execute_function> <filter_condition/> <is_rest>false</is_rest> <message/> <name>Validate Assigned Agent Membership</name> <order>140</order> <priority>100</priority> <rest_method/> <rest_method_text/> <rest_service/> <rest_service_text/> <rest_variables/> <role_conditions/> <script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) { // AAP Section 0.5.7: assigned_agent "must be member of // assigned_group". Enforced at the entity level so the constraint // is honored regardless of how the change is initiated. if (current.assigned_agent && !current.assigned_agent.nil() && current.assigned_group && !current.assigned_group.nil()) { var groupId = current.assigned_group.toString(); var userId = current.assigned_agent.toString(); var grm = new GlideRecord('sys_user_grmember'); grm.addQuery('user', userId); grm.addQuery('group', groupId); grm.query(); if (!grm.hasNext()) { gs.addErrorMessage('Assigned agent must be a member of the assigned group.'); current.setAbortAction(true); } } })(current, previous); ]]></script> <sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_domain>global</sys_domain> <sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path> <sys_id>3efa3707232db4024fa337290642f5ab</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Validate Assigned Agent Membership</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_script_x_casemgmt_validate_assigned_agent_membership</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_updated_on> <template/> <when>before</when> </sys_script> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Clear Pending Reason on In Progress
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_script"> <sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <abort_action>false</abort_action> <access>package_private</access> <action_delete>false</action_delete> <action_insert>false</action_insert> <action_query>false</action_query> <action_update>true</action_update> <active>true</active> <add_message>false</add_message> <advanced>true</advanced> <change_fields>false</change_fields> <client_callable>false</client_callable> <collection>x_casemgmt_case</collection> <condition/> <description>Before-update on x_casemgmt_case: clears pending_reason on Pending -> In Progress.</description> <execute_function>false</execute_function> <filter_condition/> <is_rest>false</is_rest> <message/> <name>Clear Pending Reason on In Progress</name> <order>150</order> <priority>100</priority> <rest_method/> <rest_method_text/> <rest_service/> <rest_service_text/> <rest_variables/> <role_conditions/> <script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) { // AAP Section 0.5.5: "Pending -> In Progress: None; clears // pending_reason". Entity-level enforcement of that clear behavior. if (previous && previous.status == 'Pending' && current.status == 'In Progress') { current.pending_reason = ''; } })(current, previous); ]]></script> <sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_domain>global</sys_domain> <sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path> <sys_id>baf567ed900b513cda99925b86cbabf4</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Clear Pending Reason on In Progress</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_script_x_casemgmt_clear_pending_reason_on_inprogress</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 12:00:00</sys_updated_on> <template/> <when>before</when> </sys_script> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Case Party Conditional Fields
sys_update_xml.payload:
true party_typeISNOTEMPTY^ORparty_typeISEMPTY^EQ Polymorphic field-rendering UI Policy on x_casemgmt_case_party. Implements the ServiceNow-native equivalent of ArkCase's @DiscriminatorColumn(cm_class_name) single-table inheritance pattern from PersonAssociation.java and the dual-table @ManyToOne pattern from PersonOrganizationAssociation.java per AAP Section 0.4.3 ("Polymorphic association via single-table choice + UI Policy"). Uses run_scripts=true with an imperative onCondition script to deterministically set field visibility and mandatory state for all three party_type values: "Person" (show person + mandatory; hide organization), "Organization" (show organization + mandatory; hide person), and empty (hide both fields, both not mandatory). The script_true block is the sole logic path; no declarative actions are used because the declarative two-policy approach with reverse_if_false=true has an unavoidable order-conflict in the empty-state case. Runs on form load (on_load=true) so existing case_party records render correctly when opened. The party_type field itself is mandatory at the dictionary level (../dictionary/x_casemgmt_case_party_party_type.xml), so users cannot save a record without picking one; the mandatory state of person/organization is therefore conditional on party_type and enforced ONLY through this UI Policy. true false Case Party Conditional Fields true 100 false true Polymorphic field rendering: show person+mandatory when party_type=Person, show organization+mandatory when party_type=Organization, hide both when party_type is empty. sys_ui_policy admin 2025-01-01 00:00:00 global 854295ebb4c8309eea6a52aa788ec8a9 0 x_casemgmt x_casemgmt admin 2025-01-01 00:00:00 x_casemgmt_case_party
0

sys_update_xml.name: Case Management Portal
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sp_portal"> <sp_portal action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <background_color/> <background_image/> <background_image_dv/> <catalog/> <catalog_dv/> <description>Unauthenticated Experience Portal for the Case Management scoped application. Provides two pages: case_submit (anonymous case submission) and case_status (anonymous case status lookup). Replaces ArkCase's acm-service-portal-gateway anonymous-submission pattern (PortalRequestService.submitRequest and PortalRequestService.getRequestStatus). Per AAP Section 0.4.4 (UI Design - default theme), Section 0.7.2 (deployment step 3 - portal URL), and the seven validation gates (Gate 4 portal-submission, Gate 5 portal-lookup). Public access is enabled via the public flag plus a login_page redirect target that points to the submission page itself, so anonymous callers never see a login prompt. The portal uses the platform default Service Portal theme (no custom CSS, no custom branding) per AAP Section 0.4.4. Knowledge-base and service-catalog integrations are out of scope per AAP Section 0.3.2 and are intentionally empty.</description> <enable_legacy_recents>false</enable_legacy_recents> <hide_portal_name>false</hide_portal_name> <homepage display_value="Case Submission">x_casemgmt_case_submit</homepage> <homepage_dv display_value="Case Submission">x_casemgmt_case_submit</homepage_dv> <icon/> <icon_dv/> <kb_categories_visible>false</kb_categories_visible> <knowledge_base/> <knowledge_base_dv/> <login_page display_value="Case Submission">x_casemgmt_case_submit</login_page> <login_page_dv display_value="Case Submission">x_casemgmt_case_submit</login_page_dv> <logo/> <logo_dv/> <public>true</public> <quick_start_guide_url/> <recents_count>0</recents_count> <show_more_threshold>0</show_more_threshold> <sys_class_name>sp_portal</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>82079e7877f4f6d09975ab96fc0fa2fa</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>x_casemgmt_case_portal</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sp_portal_x_casemgmt_case_portal</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <theme/> <theme_dv/> <title>Case Management Portal</title> <typeahead_min_length>3</typeahead_min_length> <url_suffix>x_casemgmt_case_portal</url_suffix> </sp_portal> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Submit a Case
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sp_page"> <sp_page action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <category/> <description>Unauthenticated Service Portal page for case submission. Embeds the case submission widget (sp_widget_x_casemgmt_case_submission_widget) which renders a 5-field form (subject, type, description, requester_name, requester_email) and POSTs to /api/x_casemgmt/case_submit. On success, the embedded widget transitively displays the confirmation widget (sp_widget_x_casemgmt_case_confirmation_widget) with the returned case number and the verbatim message 'Your case has been submitted'. Member of the x_casemgmt_case_portal Experience Portal AND serves as the portal's homepage (the portal record's homepage_dv references this page's id). Replaces ArkCase's acm-service-portal-gateway anonymous-submission pattern. Per AAP Sections 0.4.4 and 0.7.4 and Validation Gate 4 (Portal - submission).</description> <draft>false</draft> <dynamic_title_structure/> <hide_for_kb>true</hide_for_kb> <id>x_casemgmt_case_submit</id> <internal>false</internal> <omit_watcher>true</omit_watcher> <page_internal><![CDATA[ { "containers": [ { "id": "container_main", "containerClass": "container", "rows": [ { "id": "row_submit", "columns": [ { "id": "col_submit", "size": 12, "instances": [ { "id": "instance_submission_widget", "widget_id": "x_casemgmt_case_submission_widget", "widgetReference": "x_casemgmt_case_submission_widget", "title": "Submit a Case", "options": {} } ] } ] } ] } ] } ]]></page_internal> <page_specific_css/> <public>true</public> <roles/> <sys_class_name>sp_page</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>6a1f3c2ffd653613304512a734aab83b</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Submit a Case</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sp_page_x_casemgmt_case_submit</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <title>Submit a Case</title> </sp_page> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Case Status Lookup
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sp_page"> <sp_page action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <category/> <description>Unauthenticated Service Portal page for case status lookup. Embeds the case lookup widget (sp_widget_x_casemgmt_case_lookup_widget) which renders a single case-number input plus result panel showing ONLY status, subject, opened_date on match, or the verbatim text 'No case found with that number.' on no-match. Reachable via direct URL [instance URL]/x_casemgmt_case_portal?id=x_casemgmt_case_status. Member of the x_casemgmt_case_portal Experience Portal but NOT its homepage (the submission page is the homepage). Replaces ArkCase's GetCaseByNumberService and PortalRequestService.getRequestStatus anonymous-status-lookup pattern. Per AAP Sections 0.4.4 and 0.7.4 (verbatim no-case-found message) and Validation Gate 5 (Portal - lookup).</description> <draft>false</draft> <dynamic_title_structure/> <hide_for_kb>true</hide_for_kb> <id>x_casemgmt_case_status</id> <internal>false</internal> <omit_watcher>true</omit_watcher> <page_internal><![CDATA[ { "containers": [ { "id": "container_main", "containerClass": "container", "rows": [ { "id": "row_lookup", "columns": [ { "id": "col_lookup", "size": 12, "instances": [ { "id": "instance_lookup_widget", "widget_id": "x_casemgmt_case_lookup_widget", "widgetReference": "x_casemgmt_case_lookup_widget", "title": "Case Status Lookup", "options": {} } ] } ] } ] } ] } ]]></page_internal> <page_specific_css/> <public>true</public> <roles/> <sys_class_name>sp_page</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>8881e418f5d24b17b641505a4f1dc814</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Case Status Lookup</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sp_page_x_casemgmt_case_status</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <title>Case Status Lookup</title> </sp_page> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Case Lookup Widget
